description: A potential customer in a new housing development wants to sign up for the fastest available fiber internet.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the new address is serviceable for fiber.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the address has fiber coverage.

nodes.task_description: Present the different fiber speed tiers (e.g., 300 Mbps, 1 Gbps) and their prices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the available fiber plans.

nodes.task_description: Process the order for the 1 Gbps plan and schedule a professional installation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the order and books a technician.
